title: Reaching your goal—together
description: Physical therapy, training, and mental coaching—in Hamburg, our team brings medicine, sport, and mindset together under one roof.
quote: The strength of the team is each individual member. The strength of each member is the team.

0.name: Natalie
0.profession: Mental coach, speaker, influencer, professional boxer, personal trainer, physical therapist. Specialized in manual therapy and elite athletes. Fascia expert and Lu Jong yoga instructor. Mental coach with a focus on Wingwave. Passionate martial artist for 22 years.

1.name: Jerry
1.profession: Bachelor of Arts in fitness economics. Certified trainer (B and A license), nutrition consultant, and athletic trainer (B license). Offers EMS training. Former semi-professional football player, now football coach and boxing/kickboxing coach.

2.name: Juri
2.profession: Nutrition scientist (B.Sc.), M.Sc. in nutrition and sport. Lecturer at Macromedia University. Over ten years of experience as a personal trainer with additional qualifications as a functional trainer. Athletic background in karate, football, competitive gymnastics, kickboxing, boxing, Muay Thai, grappling, BJJ, and MMA.
